name: Terminal
description: Pure terminal aesthetic with CRT-inspired phosphor green/amber on black. Monospace only, ASCII borders, optional scanline effects. Dark mode only.

decorators.term-canvas: Pure black background (#000000) for CRT authenticity. No gradients, no textures.
decorators.term-panel: ASCII box-drawing border using Unicode characters. Background surface color, 1px solid border.
decorators.term-input: Terminal prompt style with '> ' prefix and blinking cursor. Monospace input.
decorators.term-table: Full ASCII table borders with box-drawing characters for headers, cells, and junctions.
decorators.term-glow: Subtle phosphor bloom effect using text-shadow with current color. 5px and 10px spread.
decorators.term-scanlines: Optional CRT scanline overlay using repeating-linear-gradient. Semi-transparent black lines.
decorators.term-blink: Blinking cursor animation at 1s interval. Steps timing for authentic terminal feel.
decorators.term-type: Typewriter entrance animation. Characters appear one by one, 20ms per character.
decorators.term-status: Inverse color status bar. Background uses text color, text uses background color.
decorators.term-hotkey: Function key button style '[F1]'. Border, padding, monospace. Inverse on active.
decorators.term-progress: ASCII progress bar using block characters. [||||....] style with percentage.
decorators.term-tree: Tree view using ASCII connectors. Uses ├── └── │ for hierarchy visualization.
decorators.term-diff-add: Addition highlighting. Green background with darker green text for added lines.
decorators.term-diff-del: Deletion highlighting. Red background with darker red text for removed lines.
decorators.term-sparkline: Inline ASCII sparkline using braille characters for high-resolution mini charts.

dashboard.description: Terminal dashboard with split panes, status bar, and hotkey bar.

logs.description: Log viewer with real-time streaming and filtering.

auth.description: Terminal-styled authentication forms with ASCII borders.

marketing.description: Dev tool marketing page with terminal aesthetic hero.

term-canvas.description: Pure black background (#000000) for CRT authenticity. No gradients, no textures.
term-canvas.intent: Use as the root background for the full terminal experience. Pure black is essential for the CRT phosphor contrast.

suggested_properties.font-family: ui-monospace, 'Cascadia Code', 'Source Code Pro', Menlo, monospace

term-panel.description: ASCII box-drawing border using Unicode characters. Background surface color, 1px solid border.
term-panel.intent: Use for all content containers instead of cards. ASCII borders create the authentic terminal window look.

term-input.description: Terminal prompt style with '> ' prefix and blinking cursor. Monospace input.
term-input.intent: Use for all input fields to maintain the command-line aesthetic. The prompt prefix and blinking cursor create authenticity.

term-table.description: Full ASCII table borders with box-drawing characters for headers, cells, and junctions.
term-table.intent: Use for data tables that need the classic terminal tabular format with box-drawing characters.

term-glow.description: Subtle phosphor bloom effect using text-shadow with current color. 5px and 10px spread.
term-glow.intent: Use to add the classic CRT phosphor bloom to text and borders. Apply to headings and important status text for the green glow effect.

term-scanlines.description: Optional CRT scanline overlay using repeating-linear-gradient. Semi-transparent black lines.
term-scanlines.intent: Use as an overlay on the root container for nostalgic CRT scanline effect. Apply sparingly as it can reduce readability.

term-blink.description: Blinking cursor animation at 1s interval. Steps timing for authentic terminal feel.
term-blink.intent: Use for cursor indicators and active prompt markers. The steps timing creates a hard blink rather than a fade.

term-type.description: Typewriter entrance animation. Characters appear one by one, 20ms per character.
term-type.intent: Use for text that should appear to be typed out. Creates the classic terminal output effect for hero text and status messages.

suggested_properties.animation: typing 2s steps(40) both, blink 0.8s steps(1) infinite

term-status.description: Inverse color status bar. Background uses text color, text uses background color.
term-status.intent: Use for status bars, header bars, and toolbar strips. The inverted colors create the classic terminal status line.

term-hotkey.description: Function key button style '[F1]'. Border, padding, monospace. Inverse on active.
term-hotkey.intent: Use for keyboard shortcut labels and action buttons. The bracketed style mimics classic terminal function key indicators.

term-progress.description: ASCII progress bar using block characters. [||||....] style with percentage.
term-progress.intent: Use for progress indicators and loading bars. The ASCII block characters maintain the terminal aesthetic.

term-tree.description: Tree view using ASCII connectors. Uses ├── └── │ for hierarchy visualization.
term-tree.intent: Use for hierarchical data like file trees, directory listings, or nested navigation.

term-diff-add.description: Addition highlighting. Green background with darker green text for added lines.
term-diff-add.intent: Use in diff views and code comparison displays for added lines.

term-diff-del.description: Deletion highlighting. Red background with darker red text for removed lines.
term-diff-del.intent: Use in diff views for removed lines. Red contrast against the green-dominant palette ensures visibility.

term-sparkline.description: Inline ASCII sparkline using braille characters for high-resolution mini charts.
term-sparkline.intent: Use for compact inline trend visualizations within data tables or status displays.
